description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly black upper, accented by white and gray panels along the sides and heel. The shoe features a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with a visible pull tab at the back for easy wearing. The lacing system is standard with black laces threaded through metal eyelets, and the tongue displays a patch with branding and a small Italian flag motif. The midsole is white and contrasts with the darker upper, while the outsole appears flat and suitable for urban surfaces. The word 'IMMORTALE' is prominently printed on the heel, and a circular logo is visible on the ankle area. The overall design suggests durability and style, making it suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A stylish high-top sneaker with black, white, and gray panels, featuring branding details and a padded collar. The shoe has a standard lacing system and a contrasting white midsole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the 'IMMORTALE' branding on the heel and the pull tab at the top of the collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black and gray panels, circular ankle logo, and the shoe's overall silhouette.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the padded tongue with branding, standard lacing, and the toe box.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible paneling and the 'IMMORTALE' branding partially visible at the heel.
attribute_logo: Circular logo on the ankle area, white on gray background; 'IMMORTALE' text on the heel in white.
